item.title: How does the reverse domino effect work
item.description: In this video I show you what the double domino effect is and then talk about how it works. The double domino effect is an amazing domino physics feat. Learn how to do the double domino effect on your own next time you have a bunch of bricks!

media:content.media:title: How does the reverse domino effect work
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you what the double domino effect is and then talk about how it works. The double domino effect is an amazing domino physics feat. Learn how to do the double domino effect on your own next time you have a bunch of bricks!

item.title: Marshmallows getting their soul sucked out
item.description: In this video I use my new vacuum chamber to test out what happens when you put marshmallows in a vacuum chamber. I got this vacuum chamber to add to my arsenal of ways to destroy objects and learn about them in the process. So I did not use my hydraulic press to crush the marshmallows, but I they still get crushed in the end. First they puff up due to the air pressure inside of them, then they equilibrate with the vacuum and stop expanding. Then, I open the vacuum and the atmosphere crushed them into marshmallow raisins!

media:content.media:title: Marshmallows getting their soul sucked out
media:content.media:description: In this video I use my new vacuum chamber to test out what happens when you put marshmallows in a vacuum chamber. I got this vacuum chamber to add to my arsenal of ways to destroy objects and learn about them in the process. So I did not use my hydraulic press to crush the marshmallows, but I they still get crushed in the end. First they puff up due to the air pressure inside of them, then they equilibrate with the vacuum and stop expanding. Then, I open the vacuum and the atmosphere crushed them into marshmallow raisins!

item.title: Silent propellers
item.description: In this video, I show you why uneven blade spacing makes propellers sound quieter.

media:content.media:title: Silent propellers
media:content.media:description: In this video, I show you why uneven blade spacing makes propellers sound quieter.

item.title: Battery stores hate this one trick
item.description: I show you how to tell if a battery is empty by bouncing it

media:content.media:title: Battery stores hate this one trick
media:content.media:description: I show you how to tell if a battery is empty by bouncing it

item.title: Water streams can keep light inside
item.description: In this video I show you what happens when you shine a laser on a giant 10lb block of ice. Then I test it with ice that I dyed with a black pigment called black ice! I talk bout total internal reflection and fiber optic cables and show you how light can stays inside things like liquid and glass.

media:content.media:title: Water streams can keep light inside
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you what happens when you shine a laser on a giant 10lb block of ice. Then I test it with ice that I dyed with a black pigment called black ice! I talk bout total internal reflection and fiber optic cables and show you how light can stays inside things like liquid and glass.
